overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a mountainous tribal settlement. She crosses a large wooden rope bridge past a seated guard, then continues toward a lakeside campfire in a scenic valley with snow-capped peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path approaching wooden tribal gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path between rocky cliffs toward wooden fortification

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation flanking the left side of the path
tall reddish-brown rock formation flanking the right side of the path
uneven dirt trail with scattered stones winding through the canyon
large tribal wooden gate structure with beams and watchtower visible ahead
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks along a dirt path flanked by tall rocky cliffs, approaching a large wooden tribal gate structure. The environment is a narrow canyon with sparse vegetation and clear morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden rope bridge with tribal decorations

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto wooden bridge structure
character passes seated tribesman on left side

agents.ego_description: crossing elevated wooden bridge, approaching and passing a seated guard with red banner

notable_agents.action: tribesman sitting against rock wall next to red banner

entered.detail: weathered wooden log planks forming the bridge walkway
thick rope handrails along the right side of the bridge
tall wooden watchtower structure with beams and platforms
red cloth banner with white tribal symbols mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Aloy steps onto a weathered wooden bridge made of logs and ropes, passing a seated tribesman with a red banner on the left. The bridge is elevated between the remaining left cliff wall and wooden support towers on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated bridge section overlooking mountain valley

events.description: bridge surface changes to lighter wood with blue rope decorations

agents.ego_description: continuing across bridge with view opening to expansive mountain valley ahead

entered.detail: decorative blue woven ropes wrapped around wooden posts
wide valley with distant mountains and settlement visible ahead
dilapidated wooden beams and debris on the right side of bridge

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the bridge, the wooden planks become lighter with blue rope decorations. The view opens to a vast mountain valley ahead as Aloy approaches the end of the bridge structure, with broken wooden debris visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow with lakeside campfire

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto dirt path in open valley
approaches active campfire with standing figure near lakeside

agents.ego_description: descending from bridge toward lakeside campfire with NPC standing nearby

notable_agents.action: figure standing near campfire under large tree

entered.detail: sandy dirt trail leading through grassy meadow
active burning campfire with smoke rising
mature tree with spreading branches providing shade
calm body of water reflecting the surrounding mountains
lush green grass and small plants covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Aloy steps off the bridge into a wide open valley with green grass and scattered trees. She approaches a campfire with a standing figure near a calm mountain lake, with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance under a clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, rocky canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit mountain valley. It begins with Aloy walking along a dirt path flanked by tall cliffs toward a large wooden tribal gate under clear morning light. As she moves forward, the terrain shifts as she steps onto a weathered log and rope bridge, passing a seated tribesman beside a red banner. The scene then expands as the bridge planks transition to lighter wood with blue decorations, revealing a wide vista of the valley ahead and broken debris to the right. Finally, the camera follows her off the bridge and into an open expanse of green grass and scattered trees, approaching a campfire by a calm lake with snow-capped peaks towering in the distance.
